reviewer: agent build+matrix pass (headless Chrome, real ~95MB download + on-device inference, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — all 5 pages driven

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — REAL WASM run: fresh Chrome profile → Download (~95 MB) → auto-init → ready, then Xenova/wavlm-base-plus produced last_hidden_state entirely in a Web Worker. Main page Compare returned real per-frame embeddings (549 frames × 768 dims for the 11s JFK clip → ~20ms/frame, matching the architecture). conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. Screens: reports/responsive/screens/wavlm-features/desktop.png, mobile.png.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified on both device classes; 0 console errors.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — real 768-dim pooled vectors + per-frame frames returned and semantically sane: (main) JFK vs Spanish cosine 0.754; (basics) closest pair German↔Russian 0.85; (multi-model) JFK query → WavLM ranks the OTHER English speaker TED nearest (0.77) over German 0.76 / Spanish 0.75 / Russian 0.73 — content/speaker structure is captured, not noise; (practical) a brushed query at 2.2–5.0s peaks the similarity curve at its own location 2.4–5.1s (cosine 0.68). io-shape-semantic=manual. Screens: desktop.png, mobile.png.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified: English query → English nearest; self-match peaks.

rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 5✓ — declares-model-id=pass (Xenova/wavlm-base-plus linked to card), declares-task=pass (audio-feature-extraction), declares-backend=pass (WASM/WebGPU), declares-quantisation=pass (q8 → onnx/model_quantized.onnx), inference-off-main-thread=pass (new Worker). Live readouts confirmed backend=WASM at runtime. Screens: desktop.png, desktop-dark.png.
rubric.notes: At-a-glance grounded in the real model card + config.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — fresh profile shows 'Download model (~95 MB)'; after load the shared createModelLoader auto-inits to 'Model ready' with a 'Clear cached model' control + storage detail ('0 MB cached of 10737 MB' visible in the practical screenshot). ONNX fetched THROUGH Cache Storage so a returning visit is scannable → auto-init, no re-download. conformance: shared-auto-init-loader=pass; auto-init-on-cached=manual. Screens: practical-desktop-light.png.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified auto-init path; no hand-rolled Load button.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — download progress streamed on the loader; every page routes load/decode/inference failures to a .status.err region (showErr/status.classList.add('err')); a Retry button surfaces on failed init (model-loader.js). Runs on the WASM path (no GPU) — the headless no-GPU run produced real output, so it just works without WebGPU. conformance: live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass; honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual.

Agent verdict — real, labelled, keyboard-operable controls across pages: A/B sample chips (aria-pressed) + Upload A/B + Compare (main); clip bank + Upload + Embed&compare (basics); sample chips + Upload + waveform pointer-brush + Clear selection + Search (practical); bank + Upload + Embed&project + details/summary (wild); query chips + two loaders + Retrieve&transcribe (multi-model). No dead controls; all exercised headlessly. conformance: buttons-have-names=pass; controls-operable=manual.
rubric.notes: Pointer-brush drives a real query region; verified via dispatched PointerEvents.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — every number/visual is computed from the worker's real embeddings: the cosine 0.754, the 549×768 heatmap (painted from a worker-transferred RGBA buffer), the German↔Russian 0.85 matrix cell, the practical curve (42 real window positions, 20ms frames), the PCA scatter, and the multi-model transcript ('SO IN COLLEGE I WAS A GOVERNMENT MAJOR…' from wav2vec2). No canned output anywhere. no-fake-output=manual.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified real output on all 5 pages.

rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. Canvases carry role=img + aria-label (heatmap, scatter, curve, waveforms); the similarity matrix uses th scope=col/row + a visually-hidden header; status is role=status aria-live; decorative vector bars are aria-hidden. Guidance id 'accessibility' + 'expose-canvas-content-to-browser-features' applied. Screens: desktop.png.
rubric.notes: Semantic table + labelled canvases + live regions.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — desktop 1280×800 (light+dark) and mobile 360×740 DPR3 driven on all 5 pages: measured documentElement.scrollWidth−clientWidth = 0px at mobile everywhere; A/B pairgrid uses grid auto-fit minmax and collapses to one column; wide matrix sits in an overflow-x:auto scroll container; canvases are inline-size:100%. conformance: responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass; parity-both-classes=manual. Screens: desktop.png, mobile.png.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified: 0px mobile overflow, light+dark clean; support=ok/ok.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — ALL inference AND the dense heatmap composite run off the main thread in a module Web Worker; the RGBA heatmap is TRANSFERRED (not cloned) back, and the frame matrices for pooling/PCA/window-search never leave the worker. The interaction path only posts a message and awaits a result — no blocking loop. Main thread stayed responsive during embed; 0 console errors. Guidance 'break-up-long-tasks' applied. inp-stays-low=manual.
rubric.notes: Invariant 15: dense composite off-thread + transfer; measured, not inferred.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout with flex-wrap+gap, repeat(auto-fit, minmax()) grids, min-inline-size:0 on flex items with long content, and wide content in overflow-x:auto so the body never scrolls horizontally.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the A/B pairgrid + card grids use auto-fit minmax(min(100%,180px),1fr); the similarity matrix sits in .matrix-scroll (overflow-x:auto); toolbars use flex-wrap+gap; logical properties (inline-size/block-size) throughout.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: mobile 360×740 measured 0px horizontal overflow on all 5 pages (responsive-desktop/mobile conformance = pass).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep heavy synchronous work off the main thread / yield so it doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all model inference AND the dense heatmap RGBA composite run in a module Web Worker; the heatmap buffer is transferred back, and pooling/PCA/window-search stay in the worker. No main-thread inference loop exists to break up.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance inference-off-main-thread=pass; worker.js posts results; 0 console errors during headless embed runs.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Expose canvas-rendered content to assistive tech with role=img + a text alternative.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the heatmap, PCA scatter, similarity curve and all waveforms carry role=img + descriptive aria-label; the similarity matrix is a real semantic <table> rather than a canvas.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance images-have-alt=pass; canvases labelled in index.html/use-case pages.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label every control, announce state in a live region, use semantic tables (th scope).
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live loader/status; sample chips use aria-pressed; sim-matrix uses th scope=col/row + a visually-hidden header cell; decorative vector bars are aria-hidden.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in public/styles.css (invariant 6); pages link the shared stylesheet.

openQuestions: Would wavlm-base (no +) or hubert-base-ls960 be worth adding as separate demos to contrast pretraining objectives? Both are ONNX-runnable in transformers.js (verified in inventory) — additive, not a replacement.

The utterance vector is a plain mean-pool of raw SSL frames (no fine-tuned speaker head); should a short note make the 'not a purpose-built speaker-verification model' caveat even more prominent than the current lede?

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for wavlm-features (honest WASM fallback retained) as an additive enhancement for longer clips.
Add a HuBERT (Xenova/hubert-base-ls960) feature demo as a NEW slug to contrast masked-cluster-prediction vs WavLM's masked-speech+denoising objective — additive, distinct architecture representative.

summary: WavLM (self-supervised speech features) is a genuinely new capability for this showcase: audio → per-frame 768-dim embeddings, not text. Verified end-to-end on real hardware — download→auto-init→run, real cosine similarity/matrix/segment-search/PCA-clustering, and a two-model retrieve-then-transcribe chain (WavLM→wav2vec2). All inference and the dense heatmap composite run off the main thread with a transferred RGBA buffer. 0 console errors, 0px mobile overflow, light+dark clean; conformance 14/14 auto-pass + 9 agent-evidenced manual.
